parameters.query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- REQUÊTE PRINCIPALE : ACCIDENTS DE TRAVAIL AVEC INFOS COMPLÈTES
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SELECT 
    -- ─── ACCIDENT ───
    AT.YNUM_0 as id_accident,
    AT.YMAT_0 as matricule_salarie,
    AT.YCODSAL_0 as code_salarie,
    AT.YDATAT_0 as date_accident,
    AT.YHEURAT_0 as heure_accident,
    AT.YLIEUAT_0 as lieu_accident,
    AT.YDESAT_0 as description_courte,
    AT.YNATBLES_0 as type_accident,
    SD.LANMES_0 as gravite,
    AT.CREDATTIM_0 as date_creation,
    AT.UPDDATTIM_0 as date_derniere_maj,
    
    -- ─── CALCULS DÉLAIS ───
    P.VALEUR_0 as delai_total_jours,
    DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0) as date_limite_depot,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, AT.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE()) AS jours_depuis_creation,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) AS jours_restants,
    
    -- ─── PRIORITÉ DYNAMIQUE ───
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) <= 2 THEN 'PDG'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) = 3 THEN 'SUPERIEUR'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) = 4 THEN 'INFIRMIER'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS niveau_escalade,
    
    -- ─── INFOS SALARIÉ VICTIME ───
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_victime,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_victime,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE AT.YCODSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_victime,
    
    -- ─── INFIRMIER ───
    S1.code_salarie_infirmier,
    S1.nom_infirmier,
    S1.prenom_infirmier,
    S1.email_infirmier,
    S1.telephone_mobile_infirmier,
    S1.chat_id_infirmier,
    S1.langue_infirmier,
    S1.bot_infirmier,
    S1.titre_infirmier,
    S1.service_infirmier,
    
    -- ─── SUPÉRIEUR ───
    S1.code_superieur,
    S1.nom_superieur,
    S1.prenom_superieur,
    S1.email_superieur,
    S1.telephone_mobile_superieur,
    S1.chat_id_superieur,
    S1.langue_superieur,
    S1.bot_superieur,
    
    -- ─── PDG (CONFIG FIXE) ───
    'PDG' as code_pdg,
    'Direction Générale' as nom_pdg,
    'Jbel Annour' as prenom_pdg,
    'ai@jbel-annour.ma' as email_pdg,
    NULL as telephone_pdg,
    '' as chat_id_pdg,
    'ARA' as langue_pdg,
    '@Jbel_Annour_IAbot' as bot_pdg

FROM 
    jbelrh.JBELRH.YAT AT 
    LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.APLSTD SD ON AT.YGRAVAT_0 = SD.LANNUM_0  
    CROSS APPLY (
        SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ADOVAL
        WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YPJAT'
    ) P
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT  
            s.XSAL_0 AS code_salarie_infirmier,
            s.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_infirmier,
            s.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_infirmier,
            s.YTELE_0 AS telephone_mobile_infirmier,
            s.XEMAIL_0 AS email_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS langue_infirmier,
            (SELECT sf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sf WHERE s.XSAL_0 = sf.XSAL_0) AS bot_infirmier,
            z.YTIT_0 AS titre_infirmier,
            ZS.YTIT_0 AS service_infirmier,
            
            s.YSUP_0 AS code_superieur,
            ss.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom_superieur,
            ss.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom_superieur,
            ss.XEMAIL_0 AS email_superieur,
            ss.YTELE_0 as telephone_mobile_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
            (SELECT sup.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL sup WHERE s.YSUP_0 = sup.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur
        FROM 
            jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE z ON s.ZPOSTE_0 = z.YNUM_0
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL ss ON ss.XSAL_0 = s.YSUP_0
            OUTER APPLY (
                SELECT y.YSRV_0
                FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE y
                WHERE y.YNUM_0 = s.ZPOSTE_0
            ) po
            LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZSERVICES ZS ON po.YSRV_0 = ZS.YNUM_0
        WHERE
            s.XFLG_0 = 2
            AND po.YSRV_0 = 'SRV010'
        GROUP BY 
            s.XSAL_0, s.XNAMSAL_0, s.XPRENOM_0, z.YTIT_0, s.YSUP_0,
            ss.XPRENOM_0, ss.XNAMSAL_0, s.XEMAIL_0, ss.XEMAIL_0,
            s.YTELE_0, ss.YTELE_0, ZS.YTIT_0
    ) S1

WHERE 
    -- Accident sans attestation complète
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT * 
        FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.AOBJTXT AOBJTXT 
        WHERE AT.YNUM_0 = AOBJTXT.IDENT1_0 
        AND AOBJTXT.ABREV_0 = 'YAT'
    )
    -- Date limite pas encore dépassée
    AND DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0) >= GETDATE()
    -- Filtre gravité et langue
    AND SD.LANCHP_0 = 6201 
    AND SD.LAN_0 = 'FRA'
    -- Ne notifier que si délai <= 4 jours
    AND DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(day, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), AT.CREDATTIM_0)) <= 4

ORDER BY 
    jours_restants ASC,
    niveau_escalade DESC;

nodes.name: SQL - Accidents AT avec Escalade
nodes.notes: Extraction complète avec calcul automatique du niveau d'escalade

nodes.name: Vérifier Données Présentes
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune donnée

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire
nodes.notes: Groupe les accidents par destinataire avec escalade automatique

nodes.name: Génération Messages Multilingues
nodes.notes: Génère les messages en FRA/ARA/ENG selon le destinataire

nodes.name: Envoi Email
nodes.notes: Envoi email avec CC selon escalade
